place: Chaweng Noi, Maret, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Four-Level Five-Bedroom Sea-View Pool Villa
blurb: A striking five-bedroom villa set high on the prestigious Chaweng Noi hillside, with sweeping panoramic ocean views across Chaweng Beach and refined indoor–outdoor living over four levels. European-inspired elegance — walls of glass, generous terraces and a rooftop lounge — across roughly 1,000 m² on a 1,494 m² plot. Fully furnished and turnkey, and priced to sell at ฿32,000,000 (reduced from ฿35,000,000).
detail:
Set within the prestigious Chaweng Noi hillside, this striking villa offers sweeping panoramic ocean views across Chaweng Beach and refined indoor–outdoor living across four levels. Designed with European-inspired elegance, it features expansive glass walls, generous terraces and a flexible layout suited equally to luxury living and high-yield rental investment.

With approximately 1,000 m² of built area on a 1,494 m² plot, the property delivers exceptional scale and versatility. Two open-plan living areas flow seamlessly to a large pool deck overlooking the sea, while a rooftop lounge provides the ultimate setting for sunset cocktails or an elevated entertainment space. Five spacious en-suite bedrooms, a modern Western kitchen with premium appliances, floor-to-ceiling glazing throughout, and a flexible glazed room that adapts to a home cinema, gym or children’s playroom — plus staff quarters with a kitchenette — round out the accommodation.

Fully furnished and move-in ready, it suits families, lifestyle buyers, or investors seeking strong rental performance in one of Samui’s most desirable residential zones, and is offered below its previous ฿35,000,000 asking at ฿32,000,000.

Chaweng Noi is one of Koh Samui’s most exclusive hillside enclaves — breathtaking sea views and a tranquil atmosphere just minutes from the island’s lifestyle hubs: around 5 minutes to Chaweng Beach, 8 to Chaweng town’s shopping, dining and nightlife, and 20 to Fisherman’s Village and Bo Phut. Known for its quiet beaches, boutique resorts and luxury private villas, the area strikes a rare balance between privacy and convenience, with the Jungle Club’s hilltop views and Coral Cove’s snorkelling bays close at hand.

features.l: Five en-suite bedrooms · two living areas
Panoramic ocean views over Chaweng Beach
Rooftop terrace · lounge or outdoor bar
Flex glazed room: cinema, gym or playroom
Chaweng Noi hills · 5 min to the beach
